events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the inspection conclusion directly to `/app/answer.json` with the required schema. The observed condition points to an installed support defect: the pipe shoe is not bearing on its intended support, so this should fail at rough-complete.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer.json.check <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 90,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.94,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Pipe shoe is off its intended support steel or bearing plate.\",
    \"Shoe is not fully seated or bearing, leaving the pipe load unsupported or eccentrically supported.\",
    \"Visible misalignment between shoe and support indicates the installed support does not match the required support position or standard detail.\",
    \"Condition creates risk of pipe movement, overstress, vibration damage, and failure of adjacent hangers or supports.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Hold acceptance of the hanger and support installation.\",
    \"Barricade or restrict loading and testing of the affected line until corrected if instability is present.\",
    \"Reposition, repair, or replace the support assembly so the shoe bears fully on the designed support surface.\",
    \"Verify the corrected support location, shoe engagement, guide or stop clearances, and anchorage against project support standards and engineered drawings before closeout.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"A pipe shoe is intended to transfer the pipe load into the support at the engineered bearing location. A shoe sitting off its support is an installed defective and non-compliant condition because the load path is not as designed and the pipe may shift or overload adjacent supports.\",
  \"references\": [\"project support standards\", \"MSS SP-58 pipe hangers and supports\"]
}
EOF
python3 -m json.tool /tmp/answer.json.check >/dev/null
mv /tmp/answer.json.check /app/answer.json
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json"
